channel.title: relaunch read on Trek Relaunch Book Club
channel.description: Recent content in relaunch read on Trek Relaunch Book Club

item.title: (1) TNG: Death In Winter
item.description: DNA thieves, Beverly Crusher’s maiden name and a few guest appearances from the USS Stargazer. Can author Michael Jan Friedman maneuver the Star Trek TNG books into this new era?

item.title: (2) Titan: Taking Wing
item.description: This book is next up to be read.
